description:
Windows port of Easydict - Dictionary and translation app

Windows port of Easydict translation app. Supports 15+ translation services (Google, DeepL, OpenAI, Gemini, etc.), global hotkeys, multiple window modes, clipboard monitoring, and LLM streaming. Self-contained application with system tray support.
What's Changed
- feat(theme): add Minimal (liner) theme with resource-light renderer by @xiaocang in #150
- feat(theme): refine modern style palette and unify floating-window ch… by @xiaocang in #151
- feat(translation): add Windows Local AI (Phi Silica) provider by @xiaocang in #146
- Add quality-optimized model option for DeepL API by @xiaocang in #152
- fix(selection): fast-fail and suppress non-text clipboard payloads by @xiaocang in #155
- Add OpenAI API format auto-detection (Responses vs Chat Completions) by @xiaocang in #154
Full Changelog: v0.7.5...v0.7.6
